summary: Integrated ADR 0268 on synchronized main release 0.177.83 by replaying the generic public-edge live-apply wrapper from a clean worktree, proving the bootstrap manifests rebuilt the shared portal artifacts before mutation began, preserving the public-edge to nginx_edge guard-chain alias so the full governed path runs end to end, and establishing platform version 0.130.57 with the shared edge healthy afterward.

verification.check: Latest origin/main baseline and protected release cut
verification.observed: `git fetch origin --prune` confirmed the newest published `origin/main` baseline remained commit `7f1bbe50518fd30a78a2ce5f7ee5f410ba07b0ea`; the exact-main ADR 0268 replay source was commit `813f0a4f6859360ec25a873be45390087c62c836` on top of that head, and the protected release cut carried repository version `0.177.83`.

verification.check: Public-edge guard chain and immutable-replacement exception
verification.observed: `make immutable-guest-replacement-plan service=public-edge` resolved the playbook to canonical service `nginx_edge` and confirmed the documented ADR 0191 narrow exception rule for `nginx-lv3`; `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/standby_capacity.py --service public-edge` returned `Decision: approved`; `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/service_redundancy.py --check-live-apply --service public-edge` reported `nginx_edge: declared R1 -> platform R1 -> implemented R0 [gate=unproven]`; and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/immutable_guest_replacement.py --check-live-apply --service public-edge --allow-in-place-mutation` confirmed the acknowledged in-place mutation override for this exact-main replay.

verification.check: Exact-main generic wrapper replay from a clean worktree
verification.observed: After removing `build/ops-portal/`, `build/changelog-portal/`, and `build/docs-portal/`, `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=public-edge env=production` rebuilt all three directories through the ADR 0268 bootstrap manifests, passed canonical truth plus the full guard chain, and completed successfully with final recap `nginx-lv3 : ok=61 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=14 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

verification.check: Public edge verification after exact-main replay
verification.observed: `curl -I --max-time 20 https://grafana.example.com` returned `HTTP/2 302` to `/login`; `curl -I --max-time 20 https://nginx.example.com` returned `HTTP/2 200`; and both `https://docs.example.com` and `https://changelog.example.com` returned `HTTP/2 302` to their expected `oauth2/sign_in` paths with the shared `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow` headers intact.

verification.check: Repo automation and validation sweep on the integrated tree
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with-requirements requirements/docs.txt --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_docs_site.py tests/test_preflight_controller_local.py tests/test_correction_loops.py tests/test_ansible_execution_scopes.py tests/test_service_id_resolver.py tests/test_canonical_truth.py` returned `31 passed in 26.79s`; `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/workflow_catalog.py --validate` returned `Workflow catalog OK`; `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` returned `Repository data models OK`; `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards generated-docs generated-portals` passed after refreshing `docs/site-generated/architecture/dependency-graph.md`; and `git diff --check` passed on the integrated `0.177.83` tree.

notes: This receipt supersedes the earlier branch-local receipt `2026-03-29-adr-0268-fresh-worktree-bootstrap-manifests-live-apply` as the canonical source for repository version `0.177.83` and platform version `0.130.57`, while preserving that first isolated-worktree proof.

After `origin/main` advanced to `7f1bbe50518fd30a78a2ce5f7ee5f410ba07b0ea`, source commit `813f0a4f6859360ec25a873be45390087c62c836` replayed the same guarded public-edge wrapper on top of the final release cut while preserving the earlier `public-edge` to `nginx_edge` execution-scope alias fix.

The exact-main wrapper replay intentionally used `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true` as the documented ADR 0191 narrow exception for `nginx_edge`; the default production path for future edge changes remains immutable guest replacement.
